title: It's Raining Dogs!
description: Adds three new adorable wolf variations to your world! Requires the corresponding Data Pack.
body:
# It's Raining Dogs!
This wolves adds the textures for three new adorable wolf variants. It's the resource pack companion to the [It's Raining Dogs datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/raining-dogs-dp). 

![Three dogs sitting on top of a stone floor with logs and leaves behind them. The first dog has a golden coat, behind it are cherry leaves and logs. The second dog is black, brown and white, behind it are dark oak leaves and logs. The last dog has a merle coat pattern, behind it are birch leaves and logs.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/86b6b3eb7709ecdb0302ea66262baecca05059c2.png)

**This resource pack does nothing on it's own!** You will need the respective datapack for the wolves to spawn!

## More Information
Please check the [corresponding datapack](https://modrinth.com/project/raining-dogs-dp) for additional information, as well as an important note on worldgen compatability.
